title: 05 gummy fish work crew
prompt: Use case: ads-marketing. Create a cinematic passenger-side view. Five pink and pearl-white gummy fish cross the window boundary around Tina. Each fish has two tiny stop-motion arms and hands. Together they grip one clean seam running from roof to door and tug the blue-gray car skin outward as a continuous flexible sheet. Tina holds the lychee gummy and watches from the intact black seat. Preserve miniature houses beyond the opening. Underwater foreshadow through fish and colored light only; no water, ocean, bubbles, mermaids, or separated metal panels.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Create one cinematic live-action Peelerz commercial styleframe, never a collage or storyboard grid. Image 1 controls Tina's identity, blue jacket, black top, pink lychee gummy, pink pouch, and dark car. Image 2 supplies the successful tactile miniature neighborhood, coral-teal-pink palette, gummy fish, and warm key plus cyan fill lighting. Image 3 supplies only the concept that the smooth blue-gray outer car body can peel away as one continuous flexible skin; reject its orange gummy upholstery, rainbow styling, floating fragments, and disassembly. The new agents are translucent pink or pearl-white lychee gummies with tiny flexible arms and expressive small hands, rendered as charming tactile practical puppets rather than generic cartoon mascots. Preserve Tina safely in an intact black rear passenger compartment. Peeling must read as a clean physical action, never torn metal, wreckage, violence, flesh, or horror. No captions, borders, watermarks, visible crew, random candyland, or added package copy.
